models.leads: Each lead represents a prospective customer captured through sales efforts, tagged to a Wealth Manager and tracked through the pipeline from New to Won or Lost.
models.followUps: Follow-ups are timeline entries capturing interactions on a lead — status updates, scheduled meetings, or quotation events — with automatic timestamps and author tracking.
models.quotations: Quotations are priced service proposals generated from the services catalog and sent to leads via email or WhatsApp. Each has a unique reference number and itemized pricing.
models.services: Services are configurable items in the catalog (e.g., Will Drafting, Trust Registration) with base pricing, tax rates, estimated turnaround time, and document checklists.
models.wealthManagers: Wealth Managers are channel partners who own leads and customers. Every lead must be tagged to a Wealth Manager at the time of entry.

relationships: Each Lead belongs to one Wealth Manager (mandatory assignment at creation)
Each Lead has many Follow-ups (chronological interaction timeline)
Each Lead can have multiple Quotations sent over time
Each Quotation contains one or more Services as line items with quantities
Services belong to a Service Category (Wills, Trusts, Succession Certificate)

leads.name: Rajesh Kumar
leads.notes: Referred by existing client. Interested in drafting a will for his family estate worth approximately ₹15 Cr. Prefers in-person meeting.

leads.name: Anita Desai
leads.notes: Wants to set up a family trust for her two children. Has property in Mumbai and Pune. Follow-up scheduled for next week.

leads.name: Suresh Agarwal
leads.notes: Large family estate with multiple properties across Rajasthan. Needs comprehensive will covering real estate, business shares, and fixed deposits.

leads.name: Meera Nair
leads.notes: Interested in setting up a living trust for wealth management. Has significant equity holdings and startup investments.

leads.name: Prakash Jain
leads.notes: Needs succession certificate for late father's bank accounts and property. Converted to customer after payment. Case in progress.

leads.name: Kavita Reddy
leads.notes: Law firm partner seeking will advisory for her personal estate. Wants detailed consultation before proceeding.

leads.name: Arjun Malhotra
leads.notes: Was interested in trust registration for family business assets. Decided to go with a competitor offering lower pricing. Follow-up in 6 months.

leads.name: Nandini Chatterjee
leads.notes: Simple will for single property and bank FDs. Invoice sent, awaiting payment confirmation before conversion.

followUps.title: Initial contact — interested in will drafting
followUps.notes: Spoke with Rajesh over phone. He has a family estate worth approximately ₹15 Cr including 3 properties, FDs, and mutual fund holdings. Wants to ensure smooth succession. Prefers face-to-face meeting at our office.
followUps.author: Priya Sharma

followUps.title: Video call — discussed trust options
followUps.notes: 45-minute video call with Anita. Explained the difference between living trust and family trust. She has two children aged 14 and 17. Properties in Mumbai (2 flats in Bandra) and Pune (1 villa). Leaning towards a family trust. Will share property documents next week.
followUps.author: Amit Verma

followUps.title: Documents received from client
followUps.notes: Received property documents for both Mumbai flats via email. Pune villa documents pending. Will follow up next week.
followUps.author: Amit Verma

followUps.title: Quotation sent — will drafting + advisory
followUps.notes: Sent comprehensive quotation for Will Drafting (Advanced) + Will Advisory. Total ₹75,000 + GST. Client acknowledged receipt. Waiting for confirmation.
followUps.author: Priya Sharma

followUps.title: In-person meeting at Jaipur office
followUps.notes: Met Mr. Agarwal and his son at our Jaipur office. Discussed the scope of the will covering 5 commercial properties, 2 residential properties, business shares in 3 companies, and various bank accounts. He wants a very detailed will with specific clauses for business succession.
followUps.author: Priya Sharma

followUps.title: Payment confirmed — converting to customer
followUps.notes: Payment of ₹25,000 received via NEFT. Assigning to Accounts for formal conversion. Customer ID will be generated.
followUps.author: Amit Verma

followUps.title: Quotation sent — succession certificate
followUps.notes: Sent quotation for Succession Certificate — Application Filing + Court Representation. Total ₹35,000 + GST. Client agreed immediately.
followUps.author: Amit Verma

followUps.title: Introductory call with CEO
followUps.notes: 30-minute call with Meera. She runs a Series B startup and has significant ESOP holdings. Interested in a living trust to protect assets and plan succession. Wants to understand tax implications. Scheduled detailed follow-up.
followUps.author: Deepak Joshi

followUps.title: Quotation sent — basic will drafting
followUps.notes: Simple quotation for Basic Will Drafting. Total ₹15,000 + GST. Sent via WhatsApp and email. Client confirmed and invoice has been generated.
followUps.author: Amit Verma

followUps.title: Assigned to Priya for consultation
followUps.notes: Lead assigned to Priya Sharma as the client is an HNI requiring personalized advisory. Initial call to be scheduled.
followUps.author: Deepak Joshi

services.name: Will Drafting (Basic)
services.description: Simple will for individuals with straightforward asset distribution — single property, bank accounts, and fixed deposits.

services.name: Will Drafting (Advanced)
services.description: Complex will for individuals with multiple properties, business holdings, and multiple beneficiaries requiring detailed clauses.

services.name: Will Advisory
services.description: Expert consultation on will planning, estate distribution strategy, and legal implications. Billed per session.

services.name: Trust Drafting
services.description: Drafting of a trust deed — revocable or irrevocable — tailored to the client's asset protection and succession planning needs.

services.name: Trust Registration
services.description: End-to-end registration of the trust with the relevant authority, including document preparation and filing.

services.name: Trust Advisory
services.description: Consultation on trust structuring, tax implications, and ongoing compliance requirements. Billed per session.

services.name: Application Filing
services.description: Preparation and filing of succession certificate application with the appropriate court, including all supporting documentation.

services.name: Court Representation
services.description: Legal representation at court hearings for succession certificate proceedings, including preparation of arguments and documentation.

services.name: Certificate Procurement
services.description: Collection and delivery of the final succession certificate from the court after order is passed.
